Home / Services / Pool Safety Fencing

Pool Safety Fencing

Child-safe pool fencing meeting all Texas safety codes.

Code-compliant pool barriers that protect without sacrificing views of the Hill Country. Our pool fences meet all Texas Department of Health specifications with self-closing, self-latching gates positioned out of children's reach.

We offer several styles: Decorative aluminum that complements luxury pools in The Dominion, transparent mesh that preserves views in hilltop homes, and removable fencing for vacation rentals.

Every installation includes a free safety inspection and CPR instructions - our commitment to preventing drownings in a city with 300+ days of swim weather annually.

Materials are chosen specifically for pool chemical resistance. Stainless steel hardware won't corrode from chlorine splash, and powder-coated aluminum withstands constant sun exposure without fading.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Safety evaluation and code compliance check
  2. 02 Step 2: Barrier design consultation
  3. 03 Step 3: Materials selection for your pool environment
  4. 04 Step 4: Professional installation with safety testing

Benefits

  • Prevents accidental drownings
  • Meets all insurance requirements
  • Preserves your view
  • Durable in pool chemical environment

Frequently Asked Questions

What are San Antonio's pool fence requirements?

Barriers must be at least 48" tall with gaps no wider than 4". Gates must open outward and have self-closing mechanisms with latches 54" above ground.

Can pool fencing be removable?

Yes, we install temporary mesh fencing systems popular with vacation rental owners. These meet code when properly tensioned and can be taken down during adult-only gatherings.

How close can fencing be to the pool edge?

We recommend at least 36" clearance to prevent children from climbing over from poolside furniture. The exact distance depends on your deck layout.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with pool safety fencing? Contact us today.
